hooks.command: jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "TodoWrite", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/todowrite || echo 'Failed to send TodoWrite event' #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "PreToolUse", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/pre_tool_use || echo 'Failed to send PreToolUse event'  #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "PostToolUse", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/post_tool_use || echo 'Failed to send PostToolUse event' #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "Notification", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/notification || echo 'Failed to send Notification event'  #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "Stop", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/stop || echo 'Failed to send Stop event'  #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "SubagentStop", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/subagent_stop || echo 'Failed to send SubagentStop event'  #TINSTAR

jq -c '. + {"timestamp": "'$(date -Iseconds)'", "type": "UserPromptSubmit", "tinstar_term_name": "'${TINSTAR_TERM_NAME:-unknown}'"}' | curl -s --max-time 5 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @- {{SERVER_BASE_URL}}/api/events/user_prompt || echo 'Failed to send UserPromptSubmit event' #TINSTAR
